title: The most insane week in AI
summary: AI Search publishes a video covering major AI releases in a single week, including DeepSeek V4, Kimi K2.6, MiMo v2.5, GPT 5.5, GPT Images 2, and Qwen 3.6. The video reviews models and tools across vision, language, robotics, and game AI domains.
